docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST. PLAINTIFF SNIGDHA RAO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HERMAN WENDEL IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON AMENDED CLAIMS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: AARON GRUBER; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-25-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WENDEL, HERMAN
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST.

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAO, SNIGDHA AS TO DEFENDANT WENDEL, HERMAN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-04-2026 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE AMENDED CLAIM TO MAR-25-2026 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SNIGDHA RAO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HERMAN WENDEL IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $819.23 FILED BY RAO, SNIGDHA AS TO DEFENDANT WENDEL, HERMAN
STIPULATION TO USE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY RAO, SNIGDHA WENDEL, HERMAN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-10-2025 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO FEB-04-2026 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 BY JPT LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH. PLAINTIFF TO AMEND COMPLAINT AND INCLUDE THE CORRECT NAME OF THE DEFENDANT. OFFICE MANAGER (SHANA ZENBIB) AT THE PROPERTY REPRESENTS THAT LEGAL OWNER IS HERMAN WENDEL. CLAYGOUGH APARTMENTS IS A FICTITIOUS BUSINESS AT 1945 CLAY ST., SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF SNIGHA RAO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CLAYGOUGH APARTMENTS IS PRESENT APPEARING IN COURT IS SHANA ZENBIB. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
